content.problemStatement:
Chef went to the store and saw a long queue. There are NNN people in the queue (numbered 111 through NNN from the front of the queue to the back); as it usually happens in such a situation, each person has a certain anger level. Let's denote the anger level of the iii-th person by aia_iai‚Äč.

Chef wants to finish shopping as fast as possible, so he decided to try jumping the queue instead of just standing at its back. However, he cannot make the people already standing in the queue much angrier, since that would not end well for him. Chef may stand in the queue directly in front of person ppp only if the expression
‚Ćäap1‚Ćč+‚Ćäap+12‚Ćč+‚Ćäap+23‚Ćč+‚Ä¶+‚ĆäaNN‚ąíp+1‚Ćč\left\lfloor \frac{a_p}{1} \right\rfloor + \left\lfloor \frac{a_{p+1}}{2} \right\rfloor + \left\lfloor \frac{a_{p+2}}{3} \right\rfloor + \ldots + \left\lfloor \frac{a_N}{N-p+1} \right\rfloor‚Ćä1ap‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč+‚Ćä2ap+1‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč+‚Ćä3ap+2‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč+‚Ä¶+‚ĆäN‚ąíp+1aN‚Äč‚Äč‚Ćč
does not exceed a given integer KKK. Here, ‚Ćäx‚Ćč\lfloor x \rfloor‚Ćäx‚Ćč denotes the floor function - the largest integer which does not exceed xxx.

When Chef joins the queue, his position in the queue is the number of the person directly behind him, or N+1N+1N+1 if he stands at the back of the queue. Find the minimum position at which Chef should join the queue, either by cutting in front of someone or (if it is impossible to cut in front of anyone without violating the condition above) standing at the back of the queue.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1‚Äč,a2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer - the minimum position at which Chef should join the queue.
